## 📰 News Outlet Details
Please provide the details of the news outlet you'd like to suggest:

- **Outlet Name:** 
- **URL:** 
- **Technology Vertical:** (e.g., AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud)
- **Focus/Description:** (Why is this a valuable addition?)

## ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] The outlet is reliable and has a track record of accurate reporting.
- [ ] The outlet focuses specifically on a tech vertical.
- [ ] The content is updated regularly.
